query: How do I sew on a button?

provenance.blindness_limitation: The annotator had previously inspected U1 smoke generation outputs.
provenance.scientific_use: Schema and runner engineering only; excluded from state-effect conclusions.

goal: Sew a button securely onto a garment.

steps.text: Gather a button, needle, thread, scissors, and the garment.
completion_cues: The sewing materials and garment are within reach.
incompletion_cues: A required sewing item or the garment is missing.

steps.text: Cut a usable length of thread, thread the needle, and secure the thread end.
completion_cues: Thread passes through the needle eye and its end is secured.
incompletion_cues: The needle is unthreaded, the thread is uncut, or the end is unsecured.

steps.text: Lay the garment flat and position the button at the attachment point.
completion_cues: The button is held at the intended location on flat fabric.
incompletion_cues: The garment is not positioned or the button location is unclear.

steps.text: Sew repeatedly through the button holes and fabric until the button is secure.
completion_cues: Multiple stitches hold the button firmly against the fabric.
incompletion_cues: The button remains loose or too few stitches have been made.

steps.text: Secure the final thread on the back and trim the excess.
completion_cues: The final thread is knotted, trimmed, and the button remains secure.
incompletion_cues: Loose thread remains or the final knot is not secured.

completion_evidence: The thread spool and needle are being handled.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Thread is not yet clearly through the needle eye or secured.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Guide the thread through the needle eye and secure the end.

completion_evidence: The user is manipulating the needle and thread together.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: A secured thread end and a ready threaded needle are not yet clearly visible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish threading and securing the thread before positioning the button.

completion_evidence: A needle and prepared thread are visible after prolonged threading and securing motions.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The garment and button have not yet been positioned for stitching.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Lay the garment flat and place the button at the intended location.

completion_evidence: A white button is positioned on the checked shirt and the needle is passing through the button and fabric repeatedly.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The stitch cycle and final securing knot are not yet complete.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Continue alternating through the button holes, then secure the thread on the back.

query: How do I make a classic grilled cheese sandwich?
task: Making a classic grilled cheese sandwich

provenance.blindness_limitation: The annotator had previously inspected U1 smoke generation outputs.
provenance.scientific_use: Schema and runner engineering only; excluded from state-effect conclusions.

goal: Make and serve a classic grilled cheese sandwich.

steps.text: Gather bread, cheese, butter, a plate, a pan, and a spatula.
completion_cues: The ingredients and cooking tools are available.
incompletion_cues: Bread, cheese, butter, or a cooking tool is missing.

steps.text: Place cheese between two bread slices and press the sandwich together.
completion_cues: Cheese is enclosed between two aligned bread slices.
incompletion_cues: The cheese is outside the bread or the sandwich is not assembled.

steps.text: Heat the pan over medium heat and melt butter in it.
completion_cues: The pan is hot and melted butter coats the cooking surface.
incompletion_cues: The pan is cold or butter has not melted.

steps.text: Cook the first side of the sandwich until golden.
completion_cues: The first bread side is evenly golden brown.
incompletion_cues: The first side is pale, burnt, or not in contact with the pan.

steps.text: Flip the sandwich and cook the second side until golden and the cheese melts.
completion_cues: Both sides are golden and the cheese is warmed or melted.
incompletion_cues: The second side is undercooked or the cheese remains cold.

steps.text: Remove the sandwich from the pan, place it on a plate, and serve it.
completion_cues: The cooked sandwich is out of the pan and on a serving plate.
incompletion_cues: The finished sandwich remains in the hot pan or is not plated.

completion_evidence: Bread slices are being removed from the bag and placed on the plate.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Cheese has not yet been placed between the bread slices.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Place the cheese between the two bread slices and close the sandwich.

completion_evidence: Cheese is enclosed between two bread slices and the sandwich has been pressed together.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The pan has not yet been heated.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Move to the stove and begin heating the pan.

completion_evidence: The pan is on the induction cooktop and the heat setting is being turned on.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Butter has not yet visibly melted across the pan.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Add butter and wait for it to melt before adding the sandwich.

completion_evidence: The sandwich is browned on both sides, removed from the pan, and carried away for serving.

query: How do I replace batteries in smoke detectors?

provenance.blindness_limitation: The annotator had previously inspected U1 smoke generation outputs.
provenance.scientific_use: Schema and runner engineering only; excluded from state-effect conclusions.

goal: Replace a smoke detector battery and verify operation.

steps.text: Obtain the correct replacement battery and safe access to the detector.
completion_cues: A compatible battery and stable access are available.
incompletion_cues: The battery type is unknown or access is unsafe.

steps.text: Detach the detector from its mounting base and open the battery compartment.
completion_cues: The detector is off the base and its battery compartment is accessible.
incompletion_cues: The detector remains locked to the base or the compartment is closed.

steps.text: Disconnect and remove the old battery.
completion_cues: The old battery is outside the detector and disconnected.
incompletion_cues: The old battery remains connected or stuck in the compartment.

steps.text: Connect and seat the new battery with the correct orientation.
completion_cues: The new battery is connected and fully seated.
incompletion_cues: The new battery is loose, reversed, or not connected.

steps.text: Close the compartment and lock the detector back onto its mounting base.
completion_cues: The compartment is closed and the detector is secured to the base.
incompletion_cues: The compartment is open or the detector remains loose from the base.

steps.text: Use the test button to verify that the detector responds normally.
completion_cues: The detector produces the expected test response.
incompletion_cues: No test response is observed or the detector signals a fault.

completion_evidence: A screwdriver is being used to loosen the detector while it is held against the ceiling mount.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The detector is still attached and the battery compartment is not accessible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish releasing the detector from the mounting base before opening it.

completion_evidence: The detector has been loosened further with the screwdriver.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: It remains at the ceiling and has not yet been opened.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Continue detaching the detector without forcing the housing.

completion_evidence: The detector is off the ceiling, its compartment is open, and a new black battery is aligned at the connector.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The new battery is not yet visibly seated and the compartment remains open.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Seat the battery fully, then close the compartment.

completion_evidence: The battery compartment is closed and the detector is being pressed and rotated against the ceiling base.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The detector is not yet clearly locked onto the base and a successful final test is not visible.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Finish locking the detector onto the base, then verify it with the test button.

query: How do I fold underwear for drawer storage?
task: How to fold underwear for drawer storage

provenance.blindness_limitation: The annotator had previously inspected U1 smoke generation outputs.
provenance.scientific_use: Schema and runner engineering only; excluded from state-effect conclusions.

goal: Fold underwear into compact shapes and arrange it in a drawer.

steps.text: Select one clean pair, lay it flat, and smooth the fabric.
completion_cues: One pair lies flat with the waistband and fabric smoothed.
incompletion_cues: The pair is bunched, twisted, or not on the folding surface.

steps.text: Fold the side and leg sections inward to make a narrow shape.
completion_cues: The sides and legs are aligned inward in a narrow rectangle.
incompletion_cues: The sides remain spread or the edges are misaligned.

steps.text: Fold the lower section and waistband into a compact rectangle.
completion_cues: The pair forms a compact rectangle that holds its shape.
incompletion_cues: Loose fabric remains or the rectangle unfolds immediately.

steps.text: Repeat the folding process for the remaining pairs.
completion_cues: Each selected pair has been folded into a compact shape.
incompletion_cues: An unfolded pair remains on the work surface.

steps.text: Place the folded pairs upright or neatly aligned in the drawer.
completion_cues: The folded pairs are arranged neatly in the drawer and the drawer can close.
incompletion_cues: Folded pairs remain outside or are disordered in the drawer.

completion_evidence: A black pair has been selected and moved toward the bed.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The pair is still being held and is not yet laid flat or smoothed.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Lay the pair flat on the bed and smooth the waistband and legs.

completion_evidence: The underwear is laid flat on the bed with the waistband and fabric spread out.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: The sides and legs have not yet been folded inward.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Fold the side and leg sections inward while keeping the edges aligned.

completion_evidence: The selected pair is flat and smoothed on the bed.
incompletion_or_error_evidence: Its side and leg sections remain spread rather than folded inward.
sampled_chunk_states.recovery_action: Fold both sides inward first, then form the compact rectangle.

completion_evidence: Two compact folded pairs have been placed in the drawer, aligned, and the drawer is being closed.
